author: huskiest
text:
commit_init: detect federated mode from config

Replace the .balls/plugins-is-symlink probe with a direct Config::load + master_url().is_some() check. The probe only worked because state_repo::ensure runs before commit_init in Store::init; reading config states the federated-vs-standalone intent directly, independent of step ordering.

The check is guarded by !is_stealth: stealth never runs state_repo::ensure, so a stray master_url in a stealth config must not flip ownership of the project .gitkeep placeholder.

Adds store_init_tests.rs with direct unit coverage for commit_init across standalone, federated (no symlink present), reinitialize, pre-existing-placeholder, and stealth cases.
